name: boss
description: China job search — search jobs, job details, company profiles, salary statistics, reference data (cities, industries, filters) via page-based DOM extraction and API

dependencies.searchJobs → getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobLink used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getJobDetail → getCompanyProfile: getJobDetail returns company.link used by getCompanyProfile
dependencies.searchJobs → getSalary: getSalary uses same query+city as searchJobs
dependencies.getCities → searchJobs: getCities returns city codes used by searchJobs
